text: A large tall brick tower has a clock on top.
Two people are balancing on a surfboard in the water.
A bunch of children toys outside in a yard
A black cat looks out the window as a crow outside stands in the grass.
A train traveling on tracks next to a walking path.
Two decorative, plastic, black flowers in a white stand.
A person releases a cow while others watch.
A girl wearing a t-shirt with a cake decoration on it eats cake.
Some men are riding horses in a dirt courtyard.
Two sideways stunt jets passing each other midair.
